历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 9672 → 17948 → 11617 → 12414 → 10750, with significant fluctuations; in 2022, due to a sharp drop in the provincial control line and other factors, there was a gap-like backward shift, and from 2023 to 2025, it gradually recovered, with a baseline of about 10750 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Jilin Province was 88 in 2021, 92 in 2022, 541 in 2023 (including abnormal national plan caliber), 93 in 2024, and 90 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 90, unchanged from 2025, and the plan factor has a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 73rd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable ranking in the 60–73 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; no significant events recorded for this university in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle reputation file; total Douyin popularity ranking not in the top 100, with average exposure; no historical records of admission gaps, stable public opinion; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include this university, and information on advantageous disciplines is missing.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended in 2026, aligning with the university's engineering orientation, positively driving applications for related majors; the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is about 110,868, a slight decrease of about 0.6% from 111,492 in 2025; estimated physics category candidates based on recent proportions are about 79,968 (80,421 in 2025), with candidate numbers basically stable; the provincial control line for the physics category undergraduate batch was 345 in 2024 and 340 in 2025, showing a slight downward trend, with a slight upward pressure on rankings due to slightly easier exam difficulty; the university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, which is a cross-provincial application for Jilin candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 1.5%–2%, a medium-scale enrollment from other provinces, with no significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the recovery trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight decrease in the number of candidates in the province, and a slight drop in the provincial control line, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 10,750; the predicted minimum ranking is about 10,780, with a range of 10,280–11,280.
